title: Un amore
writer: Dino Buzzati, Ennio De Concini, Enzo Ferrari
actors: Rossano Brazzi, Agnès Spaak, Gérard Blain
plot: The love life of an aging architect used to love affairs with call girls, who in the end settles down with a girl of his class but still longs for the life he has led so far, which ends in disillusion.
